Your Growth Plan.

Abitzu — A Bit of Zillion Universe
Complete Platform

47+ Modules.
One Login.

From the moment a customer walks in — to their next visit, referral, and beyond — Abitzu handles every touchpoint automatically.
01
📅
Appointment Calendar

Color-coded, intuitive calendar with SMS & email alerts. InstaBooking for walk-ins. Multiple staff, multiple services.

02
👥
CRM & Retention

Full customer profiles, service history, automated reminders, referral programs, and loyalty points in one place.

03
💳
Smart Billing & POS

Fast billing with memberships, packages, gift cards, prepaid, cashback, and wallet. Print, SMS, or email receipts.

04
📦
Inventory & Audits

FMCG-expert-designed barcode inventory. Track stock in hand, usage, sold, and missing — one report.

05
👩‍💼
Staff, Salary & Incentive

Biometric attendance, shifts, and the world's most flexible incentive engine. Salary calculations in under 5 seconds.

06
🏢
Multi-Branch Control

Control all locations from one dashboard. Branch-specific pricing, taxes, services, and real-time visibility.

07
🌐
Online Booking

Branded booking page linked to your cloud. Customers book, pay, and reschedule 24/7 — zero staff effort.

08
💬
WhatsApp & SMS

Auto-send confirmations, reminders, feedback requests, and campaigns. OTP-verified customer data.

09
🎁
Packages & Gift Cards

Regular, group, and custom packages. Conditional prepaid for retention. Gift cards that drive referrals.
